heroDescription: The Indo-Japan Chamber of Commerce (IJCC) is a premier bilateral chamber fostering economic, cultural, and educational ties between India and Japan.
homeAboutUsDescription: The Indo-Japan Chamber of Commerce (IJCC) is building a powerful bilateral bridge between India and Japan — Asia's two most dynamic and complementary economies. Backed by credible institutional alliances across sports, education, skilling, industry and technology — IJCC is the definitive platform for India-Japan collaboration.
whyJoinUsDescription: Explore the tools and resources we offer to help your business thrive and expand its horizons across borders.
feature1Description: Stay updated with our interactive calendar of upcoming events, seminars, and workshops. Plan your participation and network with industry leaders from both India and Japan.
feature2Description: Connect with a diverse network of professionals, businesses, and organizations. Our comprehensive directory helps you find partners, clients, and collaborators.
feature3Description: Access a rich repository of documents, JLPT papers, market reports, and presentations. Enhance your knowledge and stay ahead of the curve.
feature4Description: Become a part of our thriving community. Get in touch with us for any inquiries, support, or to start your membership application today.
associatePartnersDescription: We are proud to collaborate with a diverse network of partners and members.
ctaTitle: Ready to foster stronger business ties?
ctaDescription: Become a part of our growing network. Get in touch with us to learn more about membership benefits.
footerCopyright: Indo-Japan Chamber of Commerce. All rights reserved.
about_hero_tagline: Connecting India & Japan for Mutual Prosperity
about_intro_p1: Founded in 2025, the Indo-Japan Chamber of Commerce (IJCC) is a registered trust building a powerful bilateral bridge between India and Japan — Asia's two most dynamic and complementary economies.
about_intro_p2: The IJCC has rapidly established institutional credibility — signing formal MoUs with Spolto (Sports Technology), Nihon Edutech (Japan-India Skills & Placements), IIA — Indian Industries Association (Apex MSME Body), Wadhwani Foundation (AI-powered Skilling) and SEM (Full-service Event Partner).
about_mission_desc: To serve as the foremost catalyst for India-Japan bilateral growth — facilitating trade, fostering innovation, deepening cultural ties, and creating an interconnected ecosystem where both nations thrive together.
about_vision_desc: A future where India and Japan are seamlessly integrated partners — collaborating across business, education, technology, infrastructure and culture to drive shared prosperity for generations to come.
about_objectives_subtitle: Fostering institutional linkages across the Indo-Japan corridor.
obj_01_desc: Promote and protect bilateral trade, commerce and industry between India and Japan.
obj_02_desc: Facilitate technical cooperation, university partnerships and knowledge exchange.
obj_03_desc: Foster cultural understanding and strengthen bonds of friendship between both nations.
obj_04_desc: Support joint R&D, startup ecosystems and technology transfer between India and Japan.
obj_05_desc: Promote clean energy collaboration, ESG practices and sustainable development.
obj_06_desc: Represent member interests in bilateral trade policy, law and regulatory matters.
obj_07_desc: Facilitate bilateral infrastructure investment, smart city and industrial corridor projects.
obj_08_desc: Connect Agri-tech ecosystems and promote food processing and rural development.
obj_09_desc: Empower small businesses with bilateral partnerships, mentorship and Japan market access.
obj_10_desc: Build digital bridges across cloud, AI, cybersecurity and data governance.
obj_11_desc: Drive frontier innovation in quantum, space, semiconductors and biotech.
obj_12_desc: Advance joint R&D, IP creation and industry-academia collaboration across sectors.

about_leadership_subtitle: Guided by a distinguished board with expertise spanning trade, academia, diplomacy, hospitality and law.
team_rahulMishra_bio:
Rahul Mishra is the Chairman of the Indo-Japan Chamber of Commerce (IJCC), Vice President of SEWA Foundation, and Managing Director of Aamida Infotech. With over 18 years of experience in international business development, operations, and consulting, he has played a pivotal role in fostering business, cultural, and educational collaborations between India and Japan.

He founded Aamida Consulting Services (ACS) in 2011, successfully expanding its operations across India while building sustainable and long-term partnerships. Prior to his entrepreneurial journey, Rahul held leadership roles in leading IT organizations including Oracle, IBM, SAP Labs, McAfee, MothersonSumi Infotech, Four Soft, and Nucleus Software, where he gained extensive expertise in global technology and operations.

An MBA in International Marketing from ICFAI, Hyderabad, Rahul is deeply passionate about the education sector, aamidainfotech, and information technologies. He is also associated with the Japan Foundation, and strongly believes in creating authentic, mutually beneficial, and long-lasting relationships. Through his leadership across business, non-profit, and cross-border platforms, Rahul Mishra continues to strengthen India’s global presence, especially in Indo-Japan relations.
team_gajendraBadgujar_bio: Mr. Gajendra Badgujar is a seasoned professional with extensive experience in international trade and strategy. He formerly served as a Director at FICCI (Federation of Indian Chambers of Commerce & Industry), where he led numerous high-stakes business delegations and strategic initiatives. His expertise lies in navigating complex regulatory environments and building institutional bridges across Asia.
team_prakashYadav_bio: Mr. Prakash Yadav is the Managing Director of AJU Hotels, a group dedicated to serving Japanese corporate clients in India. With a deep understanding of Japanese hospitality standards and business etiquette (Omotenashi), he plays a pivotal role in strengthening corporate relations between the two nations.
team_neelamRamaiah_bio: Dr. Neelam Ramaiah is a distinguished academician and administrator. She formerly served as the Director of The University of Tokyo India Office. Her extensive work in academic exchange has paved the way for numerous MoUs and student exchange programs between premier Indian and Japanese institutions.
team_surajitKalita_bio:
Surajeet Kalita is the Co-Founder and Vice Chairman of the Indo Japan Chamber of Commerce (IJCC), where he spearheads strategic collaborations aimed at advancing trade, investment, and technology partnerships between India and Japan. With over 14+ years of experience in international business consulting, he has been instrumental in driving IJCC’s initiatives that strengthen bilateral cooperation, facilitate joint ventures, and promote cross-border innovation.

A forward-looking business strategist, Surajeet actively engages in R&D and global market studies in collaboration with reputed international research, M&A, and strategic institutions. His work focuses on building global tie-ups to bring international footprints into India while equally supporting Indian startups in accessing global markets, thereby fostering a two-way ecosystem of innovation, technology, and enterprise.

In addition to his leadership at IJCC, Surajeet serves as Director of Amida Consulting Services, guiding strategic market entry, expansion, and partnership models for Japanese and Indian enterprises. As CEO of the Northeast Sustainable Agri Forum of Entrepreneurs (NE-SAFE), he promotes innovation-led sustainable agriculture and regional entrepreneurship in India’s Northeast, where he has 2100+ farmers and 3000 hectors of land bank for trial agricultural venture . He also serves as Advisor to SUGOI Securities Services Ltd and WorldPak Courier Services (Assam), providing strategic direction on corporate growth, governance, and operational development.

Surajeet’s core expertise spans business expansion, new tie-ups, mergers and acquisitions, and strategic negotiations, tailored to meet industry standards, specific business requirements, and state-level policy or governance frameworks. Under his leadership, IJCC continues to strengthen its role as a catalyst for sustainable, high-impact cooperation between India and Japan across manufacturing, agri-tech, IT-services, pharma-medical & healthcare, infrastructure & advanced construction solutions, and green energy sectors.
team_nidhi_bio: Nidhi leads corporate tax & transfer pricing practice of the Firm. She is a Chartered Accountant and a law graduate. She has previously worked with three of the four large consultancy firms and has about 20 years of post qualification experience in corporate, expat and international tax. Her experience includes advising on international tax and domestic tax matters, transfer pricing and structuring for the businesses, handholding startups through the tricky phases in their businesses, tax due diligences, creating dash boards for monitoring compliance by the companies, ESOP planning and payroll structuring, representing tax and transfer pricing matters before the tax authorities. She has also been a speaker at the ICAI’s International Taxation Certificate Course on several occasions.
team_mukeshRanjan_bio: Mr. Mukesh Ranjan is a seasoned professional in human resources and IT strategy. He focuses on workforce creation and alignment, bridging the gap between Japanese industry requirements and Indian skilled talent.
team_yokoTorii_bio: Ms. Yoko Torii brings extensive experience in international education and career counseling. Based in Japan, she facilitates cross-border communication and ensures that IJCC programs are culturally aligned and effective for Japanese participants.
team_dhruvHans_bio: Mr. Dhruv is a seasoned Japanese language expert and business professional. He plays a key role in coordinating bilateral programs, translating cultural nuances into successful business interactions.
team_muazAhmed_bio: Mr. Muaz Ahmed is a results-driven professional with experience in sales and regional hospitality management. He drives local engagement and ensures the chamber's presence is felt across diverse regional hubs.

contact_subtitle: We are here to help. Reach out to us for any inquiries or support.
contact_corporateOfficeAddress: 218-219, T3, Golden I, Techzone 4 Greater Noida West, Greater Noida, Uttar Pradesh, PIN Code: 201318
contact_branchOfficeAddress: Indo Japan Chamber of Commerce, C/O.AJU HOTEL GURUGRAM (Behind Star Mall), Silokhera, Sector 30, Haryana - 122 001.
contact_japanOfficeAddress: Indo-Japan Chamber of Commerce, 3-chōme-16-1, Shibaura, Minato City, Tokyo 108-0023, Japan
contact_faq_a1: The Indo-Japan Chamber of Commerce (IJCC) is a non-profit organization dedicated to strengthening economic and cultural ties between India and Japan.
contact_faq_q2: How can I become a member?
contact_faq_a2: You can apply for membership through our 'Join Us' page or by contacting our team directly through the contact form.
contact_faq_q3: What are the benefits of membership?
contact_faq_a3: Members receive exclusive access to networking events, trade delegations, market intelligence, and listing in our member directory.
contact_faq_q4: Does IJCC help Japanese companies enter the Indian market?
contact_faq_a4: Yes, we provide end-to-end support including market research, partner identification, and legal incorporation guidance.
contact_faq_q5: Does IJCC help Indian companies expand to Japan?
contact_faq_a5: Certainly. We facilitate business matchmaking, trade fairs participation, and provide advisory on Japanese business culture and regulations.
contact_faq_q6: Do you provide Japanese language training?
contact_faq_a6: We provide resources and support for JLPT preparation and can connect members with verified language training partners.
contact_faq_q7: Are there any events for non-members?
contact_faq_a7: While most events are exclusive to members, we occasionally host open webinars and cultural festivals. Check our Events page for details.
contact_faq_q8: How is the membership fee calculated?
contact_faq_a8: Membership fees depend on the category (Corporate, SME, Individual, etc.). Detailed pricing is available on our 'Pricing' page.
contact_faq_q9: How can I sponsor an IJCC event?
contact_faq_a9: Sponsorship opportunities are available for all major events. Please reach out to our branding team at info@ijcc.in.
contact_faq_q10: Can IJCC help with visa applications for Japan?
contact_faq_a10: We provide support and facilitation letters for business delegations. For individual visas, we guide members through the official consulate procedures.

aima_hero_title: IJCC Signs MoU with AIMA — India's Premier Management Body
aima_hero_tagline: Empowering members with world-class management education and leadership programmes.
aima_hero_desc: The Indo-Japan Chamber of Commerce (IJCC) has signed an MoU with the All India Management Association (AIMA), the national apex body for management recognized by the Govt. of India.
aima_about_p1: Established in 1957, AIMA is the national federation of management associations in India. It unites over 3,000 corporate organisations and four lakh management professionals.
aima_about_p2: AIMA is the nodal body implementing management activities on behalf of the Government of India, shaping the leadership landscape for over 75 years.
aima_mission_quote: AIMA is the apex body of management profession in India. It provides a platform for sharing thoughts, creating networking opportunities, and enhancing skills.
aima_cred_subtitle: Shared credibility backed by official institutional presence.
aima_services_subtitle: AIMA programmes now accessible directly through the IJCC network.
aima_service_mdp_desc: High-impact executive education covering leadership, strategy, finance, and digital transformation.
aima_service_mat_desc: Gateway to 600+ business schools across India for MBA and allied programme admissions.
aima_service_dl_desc: PG Diploma and MBA-equivalent programmes designed for busy working professionals.
aima_service_forums_desc: Privileged access to India's most prestigious management summits and CEO roundtables.
aima_trust_subtitle: Delivering real results through 75+ years of institutional excellence.
aima_trust_1_desc: Officially recognised by the Ministry of Education, Government of India.
aima_trust_2_desc: Gateway to 600+ MBA institutions for employees and families.
aima_trust_3_desc: Founded in 1957 with a seven-decade track record of excellence.
aima_trust_4_desc: Over 4 lakh management professionals trained to date.
aima_trust_5_desc: 3,000+ corporate members providing a gateway for placements.
aima_quote_1: AIMA has been the custodian of management thoughts in India. We are committed to building world-class leaders.
aima_quote_2: This MoU bridges India's management ecosystem with the India-Japan business community, creating globally relevant growth.
aima_cta_desc: IJCC Members get direct access to AIMA's world-class MDPs, MAT® testing, and elite networking forums.
